title: Dagary Minor

{{Quote|I was one of the ground troops. We fought on Dagary Minor together. It was near the beginning of the war. We, uh, we didn't win that battle.|Xaart, to the Jedi Exile|<ref name="KOTOR2" />}}
'''Dagary Minor''' was a celestial body<ref name="KOTOR2" /> located in the [[Dagary Minor system/Legends|Dagary Minor system]], a part of the [[Northern Dependencies/Legends|Northern Dependencies]] portion of the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]]. By [[3976 BBY]], it was situated within the area of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] that had been widely [[Scout/Legends|explored]] by the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and was known as the "civilized [[Galaxy/Legends|galaxy]]."<ref name="TEA" /> A [[Battle of Dagary Minor|battle]] of the [[Mandalorian Wars]] was fought on Dagary Minor<ref name="KOTOR2" /> in [[3963 BBY]]<ref name="TEA" /> between the [[Mandalorian Neo-Crusaders/Legends|Mandalorian Neo-Crusaders]] and the [[Republic Military/Legends|military forces]] of the Republic, the latter of which included the [[Republic soldier|soldier]] [[Xaart]] as well as the [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] eventually known as the [[Meetra Surik|Jedi Exile]].<ref name="KOTOR2" />

{{Gamemechanics|Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords}}
[[Standard year/Legends|Years]] later, when the Jedi Exile encountered Xaart on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Onderon/Legends|Onderon]], the latter reminded<ref name="KOTOR2" /> her<ref name="Revan">''[[The Old Republic: Revan]]''</ref> of the battle they had participated in on Dagary Minor.<ref name="KOTOR2" />
{{Endgame}}

Between [[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]] and [[13 ABY/Legends|13 ABY]], Dagary Minor fell within the borders of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].<ref name="EGTW" />

==Behind the scenes==
Dagary Minor was introduced in the [[2004]] [[Obsidian Entertainment]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''. In the game, the celestial body can be mentioned in an optional conversation the player character, the Jedi Exile, can have with the character Xaart. This article assumes one hundred percent game completion and that the conversation took place as described.<ref name="KOTOR2" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed Dagary Minor in grid square M-8.<ref name="TEA" />
